goal_results.evidence: site.config.ts:177-182 — siteConfig.feed with maxItems (number, 20), format ('rss' as 'rss'|'atom'|'both'), content ('full' as 'excerpt'|'full'), includeFlows (boolean, false). F2P_FEED_CONFIG gate passes.

src/lib/feed-utils.ts:15 — exports getFeedItems() which reads siteConfig.feed.maxItems and siteConfig.feed.includeFlows, slices items by maxItems (line 43), and conditionally merges flows (line 31-40). F2P_FEED_UTILS gate passes.

src/app/feed.atom/route.ts — new file with GET handler, Atom namespace xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom' on <feed> root, <entry> elements for each item. Content-Type 'application/atom+xml'. F2P_ATOM_ROUTE gate passes.
src/app/feed.xml/route.ts — imports getFeedItems from '@/lib/feed-utils' (line 3), reads siteConfig.feed.content (line 8), replaces old getAllPosts() call. F2P_RSS_USES_CONFIG gate passes.

src/components/RssFeedWidget.tsx:179-194 — reads siteConfig.feed.format, conditionally renders RSS URL (format==='rss'||'both'), Atom URL (format==='atom'||'both'), with labels when format==='both'. F2P_WIDGET_FORMAT gate passes.
site.config.ts:180 — content: 'full' as 'excerpt' | 'full' — default is 'full', matching user Turn 2 correction.

judge_notes: All 6 goals met. The agent's patch adds feed config (goal 1), creates feed-utils.ts with getFeedItems (goal 2), creates Atom route (goal 3), refactors RSS route to use feed utility (goal 4), updates RssFeedWidget for format-based display (goal 5), and sets content default to 'full' (goal 6). All 5 F2P test gates pass with reward 1.0. Score = 0.27+0.27+0.26+0.07+0.07+0.06 = 1.00.
